title: Rrakktorr
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''''rrakktorr''''' was the inner strength and fire of [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiees]]. To unlock it, young Wookiees would go through the [[Hrrtayyk ceremony/Legends|hrrtayyk ceremony]] at their age of ascension.

==Appearances==
*''[[A Forest Apart]]''
*''[[Tyrant's Test]]'' {{1st}}

*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
